text:
Greti was a character appearing in Fee Fie Foh, the eleventh short story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Greti had long wavy brown hair and dark eyes. She was seen wearing a gray top with a red and white shirt and black trousers.

Personality

Greti appeared to be a very brave woman, as she was willing to sacrifice herself to protect her village despite being heavily pregnant. Moreover, as she knew she would die, her main focus was to have her lover succeeding in killing a Titan even though it would lead to her own demise as well.

Story

When her lover, Mod, gets back home and wants to rest, Greti reproaches him his laziness, as he does not help her and seems not to care about the upcoming events, scolds he totally ignores.

The scream of a Titan is heard outside and Greti gets out, to tell villagers to help the druidess carry the dynamite box. They put it close to the Titan and are about to fire it but the Titan is faster and destroys it before. As it heads towards the nursery, Greti grabs the remaining dynamite sticks and sings the traditional song of the tribe. As the Titan grabs her, she screams to Mod to fire the sticks and not miss but he does and Greti is killed.
